tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — repo scaffold + shared contracts
tasks.description:
Create repo skeleton + 3 shared contracts (schema.py, types.ts, cic_sample.csv stub) so A/B/C parallelize. See plan Task 0 + Shared Contracts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/ml/schema.py", "frontend/lib/types.ts", "backend/requirements.txt", "backend/data/sample/cic_sample.csv", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python -c \"import ml.schema as s; print(len(s.FEATURE_COLUMNS), s.ALL_LABELS)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["schema.py exposes 10 FEATURE_COLUMNS + ALL_LABELS + ACTION_TO_ATTACK", "types.ts matches Contract 2", "cic_sample.csv stub correct", "requirements.txt pins 8 deps"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task A: ML detector + portfolio notebook (Python, PARALLEL)
tasks.description:
Classic ML detector trained on CIC-IDS2017 + portfolio notebook + real cic_sample.csv. See plan Task A.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/ml/train.py", "backend/ml/detector.py", "backend/ml/evaluate.py", "backend/ml/test_detector.py", "notebooks/skein_ml.ipynb", "backend/data/sample/cic_sample.csv"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python ml/train.py && pytest ml/test_detector.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 classic models compared, best saved", "Detector.predict returns label/attack_type/confidence", "evaluate.py confusion matrix + importances", "notebook end-to-end", "real cic_sample.csv", "macro-F1 >= 0.90"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task B: Mesh simulator + WebSocket server (Python, PARALLEL)
tasks.description:
Swarm mesh + tick loop sampling real CIC rows + detection + attack injection + self-healing reroute + FastAPI WS server. See plan Task B.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/mesh/graph.py", "backend/mesh/routing.py", "backend/mesh/simulator.py", "backend/app.py", "backend/mesh/test_routing.py", "backend/mesh/test_simulator.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && pytest mesh/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["7-node connected mesh", "routing reroutes around dead links", "tick() returns Contract-2 state", "command() jam/hack/reset", "jam reroutes <=2 ticks; reset recovery", "WS streams state ~1/s with CORS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task C: Command-center dashboard (Next.js/TS, PARALLEL)
tasks.description:
Dark command-center UI (SwarmMap, DetectorPanel, EventFeed, AttackControls, StatusBar) driven by WS, mock-buildable. See plan Task C.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/package.json", "frontend/app/page.tsx", "frontend/app/globals.css", "frontend/lib/ws.ts", "frontend/components/SwarmMap.tsx", "frontend/components/DetectorPanel.tsx", "frontend/components/EventFeed.tsx", "frontend/components/AttackControls.tsx", "frontend/components/StatusBar.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 regions per layout", "SwarmMap animates status", "click-select + send commands", "panels update live", "works in MOCK", "tsc passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task D: Integration, polish, demo runbook (LAST)
tasks.description:
End-to-end integration (real Detector live), polish, demo script + cached fallback. See plan Task D.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/mesh/simulator.py", "frontend/lib/ws.ts", "frontend/.env.local", "docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md", "backend/data/sample/cached_run.json", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual end-to-end per demo script (both servers up)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["live end-to-end real ML", "judge jam/hack/reset works", "live detector is real model", "cached fallback works", "DEMO_SCRIPT.md complete", "README correct"]}
```
